label: Data augmentation & synthetic-data generation

node.label: Data augmentation & synthetic-data generation
node.definition: Data augmentation and synthetic-data generation expand training variation through transformations, simulation, model generation, or controlled perturbation.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Data augmentation & synthetic-data generation is to connect Datasets, sampling & splits, Multimodal, simulated & streaming data to downstream capabilities including Robustness, distribution shift & OOD evaluation, Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), Domain randomization & simulation curricula.
examples: substrate for Robustness, distribution shift & OOD evaluation
substrate for Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR)
substrate for Domain randomization & simulation curricula
limitations: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include Datasets, sampling & splits, Multimodal, simulated & streaming data.

dependencies.rationale: Data augmentation & synthetic-data generation uses Datasets, sampling & splits as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Data augmentation & synthetic-data generation uses Multimodal, simulated & streaming data as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Data augmentation & synthetic-data generation uses Equivariance, invariance & geometric priors as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Data augmentation & synthetic-data generation uses Generative modeling as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
